# YamEyes Vision

> YamEyes Vision is the creative platform of author and musician Adam Llamas, built around real life, real experience, and real growth.

## About the Author

Adam Llamas is a debut author, musician, and founder of YamEyes Vision. He grew up figuring things out as he went — through music, through fatherhood, through facing things he had avoided for years. His son Ethan changed everything.

## The Book

**To the Son Who Saved Me: Ten Truths for the Road Ahead**

A debut memoir written as a father's letter to his son. Not a how-to manual. Not a perfect story. Ten truths earned through real experience — about gratitude, honesty, accountability, and what it means to love someone more than you love your own comfort.

- Genre: Memoir, Parenting, Inspirational
- Available on Amazon (print and Kindle)
- Print: https://a.co/d/0gPBu3NL
- Kindle: $3.99
- Tagline: "Written for one. Speaks to many."
- Quote: "Because sometimes the person who saves you… is the one who calls you Dad."

## Reviews

- "Some books speak to you. This one stays with you."
- "A legacy of love, truth, and hard-earned wisdom poured out with breathtaking honesty."
- "The ten truths don't feel like lessons — they feel like anchors."
- "This book had me emotional. You can feel the struggles, the realizations, and everything life throws at you."

## Upcoming Work

- Next book: *Rise of the Flames* (in development)
